title: maclura humbertii
intro: Maclura humbertii, also known as the Madagascar osage orange or the Malagasy osage orange, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Maclura humbertii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Maclura humbertii include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
